## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Clone the framework: `git clone https://github.com/ntd25022006q/deerflow--agent-framework.git`
2. Run: `./scripts/setup.sh`
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **OS:** [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- **Node.js:** [e.g., 20.x]
- **AI Agent:** [e.g., Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, Copilot, Codex]
- **Agent Version:** [e.g., 0.45.x]
- **Deerflow Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or log output.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
